name: oneepis
description: Ficha clinica inteligente, modular y auditable.

scripts.check:api: node scripts/python.js -m ruff check apps/api && node scripts/python.js -m pytest apps/api/tests
scripts.check:web: npm --workspace apps/web run typecheck && npm --workspace apps/web run lint && npm --workspace apps/web run build
scripts.check:contract: node scripts/python.js apps/api/scripts/export_openapi.py && git diff --exit-code packages/contracts/openapi.json
scripts.check: npm run check:api && npm run check:web && npm run check:contract && npm run check:e2e
